title: MY FATHER'S HOUSE - 211info
text: MY FATHER'S HOUSE MY FATHER'S HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transitional housing where participants have access to parenting and life skills classes, the Rent Well tenant education program, and support from a case manager. A background check and urinalysis is required. Eligibility: Homeless families with minor children, meet income guidelines, be clean and sober, willing to actively seek full-time employment Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 492-3046 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 492-3046 Main phone Main phone (503) 492-3046 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call and leave a message with name, callback number, and family size FEES: Background check: $15 per adult Initial urinalysis: $20 per adult Room deposit: $150 per adult. Refunded when the resident leaves their room in order. Class fee: $35 per adult Income deposit: 30% of all household income is required for the "Family Fund." Family Fund deposits will be paid to a landlord for housing needs such as rent or utilities. Collected monies will be returned only when residents leave the shelter. Funds may be held for up to one year. DOCUMENTS: Photo ID and Social Security cards for adults, some form of ID for children AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Families If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
